form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Resumes off a 32 day letup. Last start favourite; won by 29 len Doncaster on March 13 over 3800m defeating Whatyouwaitingfor carrying 73kg at $1.90 in a steeplechase. The run before to post a big 13 len win. Doncaster on February 27 over 3800m defeating Noahsgreatrainbow with 67.5kg at $2.90 in a steeplechase. Looks very hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Last start favourite; won by 1.5 len Kempton Park on March 23 over 3600m defeating Pep Talking with 73.5kg at $3.30 in a steeplechase. form.formComment: Last run finished second in a small field at Southwell on April 1 over 4100m, 9 len behind Ukantango carrying 76kg at $13. The run before finished fifth in a small field at Southwell on March 2 over 4900m, slow track; 31 len behind Smurfette carrying 73.5kg at $6.50. Not keen on his chances this time.
